docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BRENDA LETICIA PAZ MENDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAN CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY PAZ MENDEZ, BRENDA LETICIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAZ MENDEZ, BRENDA LETICIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00(WAIVED) REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAZ MENDEZ, BRENDA LETICIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HAN
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAZ MENDEZ, BRENDA LETICIA
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-01-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-28-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
